title: durio mansonii
intro: Durio mansonii, also known as the Durian tree, is a species of plant in the family Malvaceae, native to Borneo. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Durio mansonii include reducing fever, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. The plant can be used in herbal preparations such as infusions, decoctions, and ointments, making it a versatile remedy in traditional medicine.
